setupSteps.title: Establish Connection
setupSteps.subtitle: Clone the repository
setupSteps.description: Initialize your local environment by cloning the Pegasus LMS monorepo. This brings all micro-services and libraries to your workstation.

setupSteps.title: Nexus Integration
setupSteps.subtitle: Install Dependencies
setupSteps.description: Sync your workspace with the required packages. We use npm/yarn to manage our high-performance dependencies.

setupSteps.title: Neural Linkage
setupSteps.subtitle: Firebase Configuration
setupSteps.description: Connect your application to the Firebase ecosystem. Initialize Firestore and Auth to enable real-time marketplace capabilities.

setupSteps.title: Core Alignment
setupSteps.subtitle: Environment Keys
setupSteps.description: Configure your API keys in `src/environments/environment.ts`. This aligns your frontend with the backend infrastructure.

setupSteps.title: System Ignition
setupSteps.subtitle: Start Development
setupSteps.description: Launch the Pegasus LMS engine. Your application will be available at http://localhost:8100/ for local debugging and testing.

usageSteps.title: Command Center
usageSteps.subtitle: Admin Dashboard
usageSteps.description: Access the high-level management console at `/admin`. Authorized agents can monitor sales and manage platform assets.

usageSteps.title: Asset Deployment
usageSteps.subtitle: Submit Products
usageSteps.description: Navigate to the submission portal to upload new SaaS boilerplates or EdTech systems to the global marketplace.

usageSteps.title: Neural Network
usageSteps.subtitle: Configure Settings
usageSteps.description: Fine-tune platform parameters, including SEO metadata, commission rates, and real-time notification streams.
